fields.label: Openclaw Endpoint
fields.description: WebSocket URL of the openclaw cloud (e.g. wss://api.jarvis.example.com/agent). Currently unused; reserved for the Phase 2.2 agent-loop transport.

fields.label: Openclaw API Key
fields.description: Per-tenant token authorising the agent-loop session. Currently unused; reserved for the Phase 2.2 agent-loop transport.

fields.label: Monthly Token Budget
fields.description: 0 = unlimited. Otherwise hard cap before overage billing kicks in.

fields.label: Provider
fields.options:
Anthropic
OpenAI
Google Gemini
Mistral
Groq
Together AI
DeepSeek
Moonshot (Kimi)
OpenRouter
Ollama (local)
vLLM (local)
OpenAI-Compatible

fields.label: Model
fields.description: Provider-specific model identifier (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, gpt-4o, gemini-2.0-flash, deepseek-chat, moonshot-v1-32k, llama-3.1-70b).

fields.label: API Key
fields.description: API key for the chosen provider. Leave blank for local providers (Ollama, vLLM).

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Only for local or OpenAI-Compatible providers (e.g. http://localhost:11434/v1 for Ollama). Leave blank for hosted providers.

fields.label: Temperature
fields.description: 0.0 = deterministic, 1.0 = creative. 0.2 is a good default for analytical Q&A.

fields.label: Openclaw Connection (operator)
fields.description: Operator config — will move to the Jarvis Admin app in a future version. Do not show to end users in production.

fields.label: Gateway URL
fields.description: WebSocket URL for the openclaw gateway, e.g. ws://127.0.0.1:18789

fields.label: Gateway Token
fields.description: Bearer token used to authenticate the secrets.reload RPC

fields.label: LLM Key File Path
fields.description: Absolute host path to the SecretRef'd LLM key file (auto-populated by openclaw_bootstrap.start)

fields.label: Openclaw Config Path
fields.description: Absolute host path to the rendered openclaw.json (auto-populated by openclaw_bootstrap.start)
